items.title: Trump tells Congress ceasefire means he does not need their approval for Iran war
items.summary: The president writes that hostilities "have terminated" because of the ceasefire, arguing he does not need congressional authorisation.

items.title: Billions of meals at risk due to Iran war, says fertiliser boss
items.summary: A shortage of fertiliser due to the Iran conflict could reduce crop yields and push prices higher, says the boss of Yara.

items.title: French PM fuels row with trip to buy baguettes
items.summary: Sébastien Lecornu visited a boulangerie on Labour Day, defying unions who say 1 May must remain a mandatory rest day.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil
Still haven't filed your taxes? Here's what you need to know
items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 川普稱伊朗想達成協議  但他不滿意德黑蘭提案
items.summary: 中東戰事未歇，傳出伊朗已將與美國的最新和平提案交給巴基斯坦調解方。美國總統川普今天表示，伊朗想達成協議，但他並不滿意德黑蘭目前的提案，雙方正在談判；被問及是否想把伊朗炸毀，他則說，「傾向不這...…

items.title: 伊朗提新談判方案 川普不滿意：領導層一團亂能達成協議？
items.summary: 伊朗提出最新的談判方案，不過，美國總統川普對於內容並不滿意，還說伊朗的領導階層派系分裂「一團亂」，他懷疑對方是否有能力接受任何協議。  消息人士透露，伊朗已向調解方巴基斯坦提...…

items.title: 緊鄰台灣！陸上自衛隊 5/17起演訓 首次聚焦日本西南離島
items.summary: 日本防衛省宣布，陸上自衛隊最高作戰指揮單位「陸上總隊」將於本月首次以鄰近台灣的西南離島為核心，實施部隊部署與物資運輸演習，並將與駐紮沖繩的美國陸戰隊進行指揮管制訓練，同時在宮...…
